Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Helgard Incarnation]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — The Helgard Incarnation is an articulate being that can summon a menagerie of creatures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — The Helgard Incarnation can tear open a Gate in a flash of swirling red light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — The Helgard Incarnation spoke the word 'Ragnarus' with a grating voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — The Helgard Incarnation was behind Zakareth at the gates of Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — The Helgard Incarnation has curly white hair, spiral horns, blue skin, and glacial eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The Helgard Incarnation is capable of carrying on intelligible conversations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Simon's blade passed through the Helgard Incarnation’s wrist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Helgard Incarnation created a layer of frost.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
